MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-04-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM WAGE GARNISHMENT. THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S FINANCIAL STATEMENT DEMONSTRATES THAT HIS EXPENSES ARE EQUAL TO HIS EARNINGS AND THEREFORE HIS WAGES ARE EXEMPT. ORDER SIGNED AND MAILED TO PARTIES. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Darren Borg, in pro per, Tel. 415.595.8857, for defendants;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's CLAIM OF EXEMPTION from wage garnishment is granted. Defendant's financial statement demonstrates that his expenses are equal to his earnings and therefore his wages are exempt. Order signed and mailed to parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
